purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.18237216.title: The Sappho Room: Hardened Reconstruction — A Self-Documenting Architecture Built From Summarizer Interface Protocol — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19025556.title: On the Architecture of Cleis: Compression, Botanics, and the Survival of Paternal Lyric

10.5281/zenodo.19893138.title: The 3:60 Room — Contributor License v2.0: Maria, Canonical Witness (EA-THREE-SIXTY-01)

10.5281/zenodo.18234110.title: The Sappho Room: A Hymn to Lyric Self-Archiving — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.19024004.title: EA-ROOM-DOLPHINDIANA v1.0 The Underwater Construction Authority / Cross-Species Semantic Labor

10.5281/zenodo.18234352.title: CPD-MARIA-2026-01-13 Credential Provenance Document: Maria, Canonical Witness — Crimson Hexagon Archive

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
